[trader#3] VIP MARKET UPDATE: $WTI
➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
U.S. Oil closed the week near $91, after a vertical repricing move that started with the early-week shock and never really cooled off. This wasn’t a normal trend grind. It was a headline-driven squeeze, and the market carried that risk premium straight into the close.

Next week stays all about the global crisis. If tensions escalate, oil can stay bid and reprice even higher fast. If headlines cool down, we can see a sharp unwind and mean reversion just as quickly. The key area to watch is ~$88. Holding above it keeps the pressure up. Losing ~$88 is what opens the door to a deeper pullback.
➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
– Binance Killers®

[trader#3] VIP MARKET UPDATE: $SOL
➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
$SOL is still trading inside the larger 6H range, but momentum cooled off after the last rejection from the top side. Price is now sitting around $83.9, which puts it back in the middle of the range where moves can chop before the next expansion.

As long as SOL holds $80, the structure stays intact and we can still see another rotation back toward $92. If we lose $80 with a clean break and hold, the range starts breaking down and the downside opens fast.
➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
